name: Sub-Team
tagline: 8 specialized AI agents + deterministic CPU pipeline
bio: Sub-Team is a full-spectrum agentic workforce powered by CrewAI. 8 specialized agents handle research, coding, data science, business strategy, creative content, security analysis, systems architecture, and hardware design. Retains the original deterministic CPU RTL pipeline, cross-disciplinary analysis, and business intelligence with Stripe/HubSpot connectors. Accessible via HTTP API or subprocess.

capabilities.label: Agentic Workforce
capabilities.description: 8 CrewAI agents with auto-routing and cross-disciplinary teamwork

capabilities.label: Research & Analysis
capabilities.description: Web research, competitive analysis, market sizing, tech evaluation

capabilities.label: Software Engineering
capabilities.description: Code generation, reviews, bug fixes, refactoring, testing

capabilities.label: Data Science
capabilities.description: Data analysis, ML model building, visualization

capabilities.label: Business Strategy
capabilities.description: Financial modeling, business plans, pitch decks

capabilities.label: Security Analysis
capabilities.description: Security audits, threat modeling, compliance checks

capabilities.label: Architecture
capabilities.description: System design, API design, database design

capabilities.label: Cross-Disciplinary
capabilities.description: Analysis across logistics, biotech, fintech, legal domains

capabilities.label: Business Intel
capabilities.description: Finance and sales analysis with Stripe/HubSpot data

capabilities.label: Agent Memory
capabilities.description: Persistent cross-session memory via Mem0 with vector search
